backstory.facial_features: He has a strong, slightly asymmetrical jawline, prominent cheekbones, deep-set warm brown eyes with faint travel-induced under-eye shadows, a straight but slightly broad nose, and subtly uneven skin texture with mild, natural pores.
backstory.hairstyle_grooming: His thick, dark hair is styled in a relaxed side part with a few natural flyaways near the crown, complemented by a neatly trimmed but lived-in stubble beard that speaks to early morning travel.
backstory.wardrobe_details: He wears a crisp, wrinkle-free sage green travel overshirt left unbuttoned over a fine-gauge charcoal merino crew neck, paired with impeccably ironed dark tailored travel trousers, offering a refined, climate-adaptable transit silhouette perfectly suited for an air-conditioned terminal.
backstory.posture_body_language: He stands with his weight comfortably shifted onto one leg, shoulders relaxed but naturally broad, occasionally using a subtle hand gesture to emphasize a point before smoothly resting his hand near his sleek carry-on.
backstory.expression_style: His expression shifts fluidly from a thoughtful, focused gaze to a warm, genuine smile that crinkles the corners of his eyes, showing active listening and authentic engagement rather than a static, rehearsed grin.
backstory.speaking_energy: He speaks with a grounded, conversational rhythm, using natural pauses for breath and leaning in slightly on key phrases to create an intimate, peer-to-peer connection.
backstory.body_build: He has an athletic, medium-broad build with a natural, unforced physical presence that fills out his tailored separates comfortably.
wardrobe_props: Well-ironed, wrinkle-free, clean attire aligned to persona and setting.
Impeccably ironed dark tailored travel trousers
backstory.setting: A quiet, glass-walled observation alcove adjacent to the primary international departures lounge, featuring low-slung leather seating and a subtle, out-of-focus view of tarmac activity bathed in soft morning light.
compliance_notes: Shot on 50mm lens, medium close-up, utilizing soft, directional natural light from the terminal windows, preserving raw cinematic photography with fine grain and subtle motion blur.
